description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linters that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. Run two jobs in parallel on ubuntu-20.04, one for rubocop and one for clang-format. The rubocop job checks out the repository, sets up Ruby 2.7, installs dependencies with bundle install, and runs rubocop. The clang-format job checks out the repository with a fetch depth of 2, installs clang-format, and runs ./bin/check-clang-format.
